sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4050" key="a)leuromantei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλευρο-μαντεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n4050.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">divination from flour</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Oenom.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:5:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
